---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition (controller, dynamics helper, integrator, doc, ...)
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What research need would this address?

## Proposed addition
Where it would live in the structure (e.g. `lib/controllers/`, `lib/dynamics/`,
`lib/integrators/`) and a sketch of the API.

## Alternatives considered
Existing tools or approaches you weighed.

## Scope check
- [ ] Keeps the template small and readable
- [ ] Pure-numpy part works without Pinocchio (or is import-guarded)
